---
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs

website:
  title: "Katelyn K Nguyen Portfolio"
  navbar:
    left:
      - href: Katelyn K Nguyen Portfolio.qmd
        text: Home
      - about.qmd

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
